_comment: Backfill mapping: broker slug → existing SharePoint folder path (drive-relative, under the document library root). Copy to sharepoint-mapping.json (gitignored) and fill in. Brokers not listed are auto-matched by company name, then created if absent. Mapped paths that do not exist are reported as errors, never created.
elite-broker: 01 - Verticales/01 - Brokercomply/01 - Clients & Prospects/01 - Clients/Elite Broker
lifepartners: 01 - Verticales/01 - Brokercomply/01 - Clients & Prospects/01 - Clients/LifePartners SPRL
